symbols: golden halo around the prophet — divine favor and prophetic authority
ornate calligraphic inscriptions — the centrality of the revealed word in Islamic tradition
elaborate floral borders — paradise gardens and divine beauty
description: A Persian miniature painting in a richly decorated illuminated manuscript format. At the center of the composition, within a circular medallion, is a portrait bust of a bearded man wearing a white turban, surrounded by a golden halo or radiance. The medallion is set within an elaborate rectangular frame filled with panels of Arabic or Persian calligraphy in gold and white on dark backgrounds. The entire page is bordered by an intricate floral and geometric decorative frame in gold, blue, red, and green on an orange-gold ground.
